title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin presents a multi-model workflow that routes frontend development tasks to specialized models: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and implementation due to superior visual output and lower cost. The approach demonstrates practical composition of recent flagship models released in the same week.
